metadata.implementation_contract: Neutral defaults consume no additional RNG choices and preserve existing RNG order.
metadata.mode: engineering equivalence; not a scientific outcome

outcome_branches.FAIL: Any missing row or field mismatch; stop J-N4 and report, do not silently fix.
outcome_branches.INCONCLUSIVE: Only for harness/prereg infrastructure failure before an engineering comparison is possible.
outcome_branches.PASS: All selected headline rows exactly equal the committed J-G1 snapshot; proceed to J-N4 preregistration.

metadata.question: Do default-neutral J-N4 substrate extensions exactly preserve committed J-G1 headline summary cells?
metadata.v_prop_note: v_prop is scheduling only. It changes arrival delay for already computed neighbor harm; queued deltas preserve magnitude. v_prop <= 0 fails fast.
metadata.what_was_not_shown: This gate does not evaluate non-default J-N4 dials or scientific hypotheses.

threshold_change_rationale.seeds: engineering equivalence intentionally reuses the committed J-G1 deterministic seed block 16000-16079 to compare the same cells; this is not a new scientific seed block
